JZW BIM AI v5.8.0
by BBMW0 Technologies

One platform.
Every standard.

JZW BIM AI brings together 787 building regulations, codes, and standards from 7 countries into a single intelligent desktop application.

🇬🇧 United Kingdom 🇸🇬 Singapore 🇲🇾 Malaysia 🇯🇵 Japan 🇨🇳 China 🇹🇭 Thailand 🇧🇳 Brunei C# .NET 8WPF + WebView2 Offline-FirstSHA-256 Signed

787 Building Standards

Structural, fire, accessibility, energy and BIM management standards for all 7 countries.

✓
13 AI Analysis Engines

From IFC geometry parsing to risk scoring and NLP-based regulatory cross-referencing.

Under the Hood

13 Analysis Engines

Each engine is purpose-built for a specific domain of AEC compliance and project intelligence.

01 / 13
📐
Structural Compliance Engine
Cross-references structural design parameters against Eurocode, BS EN 1990–1999, and national annexes.
BS EN 1990EurocodeNational Annexes
02 / 13
🔥
Fire Safety Analysis Engine
Analyses fire compartmentation, means of escape, sprinkler requirements, and fire resistance ratings.
ADB 2019Fire Safety OrderBS 9999
03 / 13
♿
Accessibility Compliance Engine
Checks designs for compliance with Approved Document M, BS 8300, and equivalent accessibility standards.
Approved Doc MBS 8300Equality Act
04 / 13
🌎
IFC Geometry Parser
Reads and validates IFC 4.3 model data, extracting spatial geometry, property sets, and relationships.
IFC 4.3OpenBIMISO 16739
05 / 13
📊
BIM Maturity Assessment Engine
Scores project BIM maturity across Levels 0–3 using PAS 1192, ISO 19650, and EIR/BEP frameworks.
ISO 19650PAS 1192Level 2
06 / 13
⚡
Energy Performance Engine
Evaluates energy performance compliance against Part L, MEES regulations, and equivalent ASEAN energy codes.
Part LMEESSS 530
07 / 13
🤖
AI Risk Scoring Engine
Uses machine learning classification to assign risk scores to project elements.
ML ClassificationRisk MatrixPriority Queue
08 / 13
📝
NLP Regulatory Cross-Reference
Natural language processing engine that maps project specifications to regulatory clauses.
NLPDeepSeek AECSemantic Search
09 / 13
🔐
Security Shield Engine
Multi-layer application security with CSP enforcement, anti-devtools detection, and SHA-256 licence validation.
CSP HeadersSHA-256Anti-Tamper
10 / 13
🌐
Multilingual Output Engine
Generates compliance reports and AI summaries in 5 languages with localised regulatory terminology.
5 Languages489 i18n KeysRTL Support
11 / 13
📧
Outlook Integration Engine
OAuth2 PKCE-based Microsoft Outlook connectivity for project communication and scheduling.
OAuth2 PKCEMS Graph APIAzure AD
12 / 13
📤
Export & Reporting Engine
Produces audit-ready compliance reports in PDF, Excel, and IFC formats with full traceability.
PDF ExportExcel ReportsIFC Export
13 / 13
🏗️
Programme Management Engine
Tracks project milestones and deliverables aligned to ISO 19650 project stages from briefing through handover.
ISO 19650-2RIBA StagesEIR/BEP

All tiers include the full standards library, offline-first operation, and lifetime updates.

Our Journey

Built by a Railway Engineer
for the World

💡
2025
JZW BIM AI Conceived
Identified a gap in the AEC market: no single platform covered global BIM standards comprehensively.
🚀
2026
BBMW0 Technologies Founded
Launched JZW BIM AI v5.8.0 - 787 standards, 13 engines, 7 countries, 5 languages.
🌏
2026 →
Global Expansion
Targeting further expansion across APAC, the Middle East, and North America.
About BBMW0 Technologies

Who We Are

BBMW0 Technologies is a UK-based software company founded by Mohamed Zaki Mohamed, a trilingual (English, Spanish, Arabic) mechanical engineering graduate and CMI Level 7 Strategic Management candidate with a decade of infrastructure experience.

We believe that compliance should not be a barrier to great design - it should be an intelligent layer beneath it. Our mission is to make the world's building regulations accessible, automated, and actionable for every AEC professional.

Based in London, United Kingdom, with connections across Malaysia, Singapore, and Japan, we are building a platform that works as hard as the professionals who use it.

🎯
Precision
Every standard referenced, every clause verified.
🌎
Global Reach
7 countries, 5 languages, one platform.
♿
Inclusion
Accessibility in design and in our products.
🔒
Security
Offline-first. Your data stays with you.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

JZW BIM AI reads IFC (ISO 16739), DXF, PDF, DOCX, XLSX, and CSV. For Revit, ArchiCAD, and Navisworks, export to IFC 4.3 or DXF first.
No. JZW BIM AI is built offline-first - all 787 standards and 13 engines operate entirely locally.
Version 5.8.0 covers 7 countries: UK (210+), Singapore (150+), Malaysia (130+), Japan (120+), China (110+), Thailand (47+), and Brunei (20+).
Licences are perpetual - one-time purchase, lifetime use. You receive a unique SHA-256 validated licence key by email.
Microsoft Store availability is in progress via Azure Trusted Signing and Partner Center certification. The direct download is fully functional.
Yes. Enterprise Plus holders receive priority consideration. Please use the Contact form below with details of the country and standards you require.
